title: Hoopoe Research-Spike Snapshot
description: Normalized JSON snapshot of an ACFS VPS. Produced by scripts/research-spike/snapshot.sh. Drives parser fixtures (plan.md §16, §18.3) and the Mock Flywheel corpus (hp-wle).

snapshotVersion.description: Snapshot envelope schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

snapshotSchemaUrl.description: Path or URL of the schema this snapshot validates against.

vpsId.description: Stable identifier for the VPS this snapshot came from. Free-form (e.g. 'research-spike-2026-05-02', 'mock-flywheel').

scenario.description: fresh = post-onboard idle project. active = mid-swarm. failure = deliberate failure injected for failure-path fixtures (§18.3). mock = synthetic from Mock Flywheel. ad_hoc = unclassified one-off.

scenarioNotes.description: Free-form notes about what was deliberately broken/configured for this scenario.

acfsTag.description: ACFS installer tag pinned at install time. Null when not pinned.

toolVersions.description: tool-name → version-string-or-null map. Pulled from each adapter's --version where supported.

fixturesVersion.description: Tag matching packages/fixtures/phase0-<date>/ when this snapshot is committed as a fixture (plan.md §2.8).

captureDurationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the entire snapshot run.

captures.description: Per-tool capture map. Keys are stable tool slugs; missing keys mean the tool was not even attempted (use the per-tool {present:false} envelope to record 'attempted but missing').

tool.description: Stable tool slug. Matches the parent key.

version.description: Captured version string. Null if not retrievable.

binPath.description: Resolved absolute path of the binary (which $tool).

present.description: True if the binary was on PATH and at least one invocation produced output. False = tool missing or unreachable.

skipReason.description: Set when present=false to explain (missing binary, capability blocked by policy, deliberate skip in this scenario).

capabilities.description: capId → status map. Mirrors plan.md §2.8 capability registry shape so the registry can ingest this snapshot directly.

captures.description: Per-invocation results. Keys are short labels (e.g. 'list', 'robot_plan', 'help').

errors.description: Top-level (non-invocation) errors encountered while attempting this tool.

argv.description: Exact argv as executed. argv[0] is the binary.

exit.description: Process exit code. Negative for signals.

stdoutJson.description: Parsed JSON when stdout was valid JSON. Absent otherwise. Adapter contract tests should prefer this field.

stdoutText.description: Raw stdout text. Always present (unless truncated). May duplicate stdoutJson when both apply.

truncated.description: True if stdout/stderr exceeded the per-invocation byte cap (default 1 MiB).

redacted.description: True if any redaction rule matched (bearer tokens, SSH passphrases, provider creds — see scripts/research-spike/lib/envelope.sh REDACT_PATTERNS).
